sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: Let me check the current state to see if the green source expanded to 23 pixels.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state
nodes = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
green = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'N'][0] if any(n['color'] == 'N' for n in nodes) else None
yellow = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'Y' and n['pixels'] > 10][0] if any(n['color'] == 'Y' and n['pixels'] > 10 for n in nodes) else None

print(f"Green source: {green['pixels'] if green else 'N/A'} pixels")
print(f"Yellow source: {yellow['pixels'] if yellow else 'N/A'} pixels")

# Check green source area
ascii = current_frame.ascii
lines = ascii.split('\n')
print("\nGreen source area:")
for i in range(8, 20):
    print(f"  row {i}: {lines[i][25:34]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
